# v1.2.12

## Vendor Default Models from catwalk

Model lists for all vendors are now auto-populated from [charmbracelet/catwalk](https://github.com/charmbracelet/catwalk) provider configs instead of being hardcoded in `DefaultConfig()`.

**Key change**: The `models` parameter has been removed from `defaultEndpoint()`. Endpoint model lists are now filled from `vendor_defaults.go` (generated by `sync-model-caps.go`), with the `/v1/models` API as runtime fallback.

**User impact**: The `Models` field in `ggcode.yaml` still works for manual overrides. If empty, ggcode auto-fills from catwalk data or fetches from the provider's API.

## sync-model-caps Tool Enhancement

The `scripts/sync-model-caps.go` tool now generates two files:
- `internal/config/context_window.go` — model capabilities (context window, max output, vision)
- `internal/config/vendor_defaults.go` — default models and available model lists per provider

Run with:
```bash
go run scripts/sync-model-caps.go
```

## Config Cleanup

`DefaultConfig()` is significantly leaner — 37 endpoint definitions no longer include hardcoded model lists. This reduces config.go by ~200 lines and makes model data refreshable without code changes.
